chunks.text: Python is a high-level programming language. Its reference implementation is CPython. It was conceived by Guido van Rossum in the late 1980s.
FAISS is a library for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors developed by Meta AI Research.
Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) grounds language model outputs using retrieved documents to reduce hallucinations.

examples.gold_answer: Efficient similarity search on dense vectors

examples.query: How does RAG help language models?
examples.gold_answer: It grounds outputs using retrieved documents
